segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Hi, sorry, I think I'm doing something wrong with the printer.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: What are you trying to print?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: A PDF for class. I sent it from my laptop, but it isn't showing up in the queue.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Are you logged in with your school account?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I thought I was, but maybe I'm using my personal email.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: That would do it. Try signing out and back in with your university login.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Okay. Also, how do I choose black and white instead of color?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Open print settings before you send the job. Color costs more.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Good catch. I definitely don't need color for this.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Once it appears in the queue, tap your ID here.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. Thanks for walking me through it.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: No problem. It trips everyone up the first time.
